name: Peter Erskine
abstract: Peter Clark Erskine (born June 5, 1954) is an American jazz drummer who was a member of the jazz fusion groups Weather Report and Steps Ahead.

interviews.title: Peter Erskine interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 9, 2020

concerts.label: A Jazz Radio Benefit featuring Bob James and Steps
Andy LaVerne: A Simple Matter of Conviction
Thomas Quasthoff, Bass-Baritone: An American Songbook
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Bergeron
about_quotes.evidence: I love playing with Peter Erskine. Whenever I play with him, we play in Dave Slonaker’s band and we played on several recordings together.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Bergeron interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 29, 2020

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: I was about to do a tour with an all-star kind of group, with Pat Metheny and Peter Erskine and Marc Johnson and Mitch Forman on keyboards
about_quotes.doc_title: Gary Burton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: I feel very good about a teaching record that has produced everybody from a John Clayton to a Peter Erskine to the Brecker brothers...
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: John Abercrombie
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve played with you know Billy Hart and just Peter Erskine... One day I sat down I was traveling with Peter Erskine on a bus
about_quotes.doc_title: John Abercrombie interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 19, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Magnusson
about_quotes.evidence: And Peter Erskine did it also with us. ... So we put that group together. And we called it the Bob Magnusson Quartet
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Magnusson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Joe LaBarbera
about_quotes.evidence: Here’s one that I don’t mind sharing because it’s with a buddy of mine, Peter Erskine.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe LaBarbera interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 15, 2021
